AddEmbeddings.description: Adds two embedding vectors and returns normalized result. FM 2024+

Append to PDF [ss].description: Appends PDF pages to the currently open PDF. FM 2026+

BaseTableComment.description: Returns the comment of the specified base table from Manage Database. FM 2026+

Cancel PDF [ss].description: Closes the PDF open in memory without saving it. FM 2026+

Close PDF [ss].description: Closes and saves the open PDF to a file path, variable, or container field. FM 2026+

ComputeModel.description: Returns a JSON object containing the result of the Core ML model evaluation.

Configure Persistent Data [ss].description: Sets or removes an entry in the persistent data store. FM 2026+

ConvertFromFileMakerPath.description: Converts a path in FileMaker format to a standard format.

ConvertToFileMakerPath.description: Converts a path in standard format to FileMaker format.

CosineSimilarity.description: Returns similarity between two embedding vectors (-1 to 1). FM 2024+

Create PDF [ss].description: Creates an empty PDF file in memory. FM 2026+

CryptGeneratePassKey.description: Generates a cryptographic key from a passphrase. FM 2023+

Delete All Records [ss].body: Delete All Records [ With dialog: Off ]$0

Delete Portal Row [ss].body: Delete Portal Row [ With dialog: Off ]$0

ExecuteSQL [full].description: ExecuteSQL full template with ORDER BY

FieldAnnotation.description: Returns the AI annotation of the specified field set in Advanced Field Options. FM 2026+

FieldDisplayNames.description: Returns the display names of a field as JSON data. FM 2026+

Flush Web Viewer Cookies [ss].description: Flushes all web viewer cookies used in the FileMaker client. FM 2026+

FV.description: Returns the future value (FV) of an initial investment, based on a constant interest rate and payment amount for the number of periods in months.

Get(AccountPasswordDaysRemaining).description: Returns the number of days remaining before the current account password must be changed. FM 2026+

Get(AccountPasswordDaysRemaining) [quick.description: Get account password days remaining. FM 2026+

Get(AIAccountName).description: Returns the name of the default AI account. FM 2024+

Get(AIModelName).description: Returns the name of the default AI model. FM 2024+

Get(FileAIModelIntegration).description: Returns AI model integration info for the file. FM 2025+

Get(FileAIModelIntegration) [quick].description: Get file AI model integration. FM 2025+

Get(FileLocaleElements).description: Returns a JSON object with information about the current file's locale.

Get(GuidedAccessState).description: In FileMaker Go, returns 1 if Guided Access is enabled, otherwise 0. FM 2026+

Get(GuidedAccessState) [quick].description: Get Guided Access state (FileMaker Go). FM 2026+

Get(InstalledFMPluginsAsJSON) [quick].description: Get installed FM plugins as JSON

Get(LastODBCError).description: Returns the last ODBC error code.

Get(LastStepTokensUsed) [quick].description: Get tokens used in last AI step. FM 2024+

Get(RevertTransactionOnErrorState) [quic.description: Get revert transaction on error state

Get(SystemAppearance).description: Returns the name of the current operating system appearance

Get(SystemLocaleElements).description: Returns a JSON object with information about the client system's locale.

Get(TransactionOpenState).description: Returns whether a transaction is currently open. FM 19.6+

Get(WindowUUID).description: Returns the UUID of the currently active window. FM 2026+

GetAddonInfo.description: Returns a JSON object with information about an add-on.

GetBaseTableName.description: Returns the base table name of a field reference. FM 2025+

GetContainerTextInfo.description: Returns information about text from a container field. FM 2023+

GetEmbedding.description: Sends input to embedding model and returns vector as container data. FM 2024+

GetEmbeddingAsFile.description: Converts embedding vector from text to binary container data. FM 2024+

GetEmbeddingAsText.description: Converts embedding vector from binary container to text format. FM 2024+

GetFieldsOnLayout.description: Returns JSON list of fields on a layout accessible to a find. FM 2025+

GetLayoutObjectAttribute.body: GetLayoutObjectAttribute ( ${1:"${2:objectName}"} ; "${3:objectType | hasFocus | containsFocus | isFrontPanel | isActive | isObjectHidden | bounds | left | right | top | bottom | width | height | rotation | startPoint, | endPoint | source | content | enclosingObject | containedObjects}"${4: ; ${5:repetitionNumber}${6: ; ${7:portalRowNumber}}} )$0

GetLayoutObjectOwnerInfo.description: Returns a JSON object with ownership information about a layout object.

GetLiveText.body: GetLiveText ( ${1:container} ; "${2:LANGUAGE: en-US | fr-FR | it-IT | de-DE | es-ES | pt-BR | zh-Hans}" )$0
GetLiveText.description: Returns the text found in the image of the specified container field using the text-recognition algorithm. Language can be one of the following: en-US, fr-FR, it-IT, de-DE, es-ES, pt-BR, zh-Hans

GetLiveTextAsJSON.description: Returns text found in image of container field as JSON with position info. FM 2024+

GetModelAttributes.description: Returns metadata in JSON format about a named model that's currently loaded.

GetPersistentData.description: Returns the value of the specified persistent data entry by name and instance ID. FM 2026+

GetRAGSpaceInfo.description: Returns information about the specified RAG space. FM 2025+

GetRecordIDsFromFoundSet.description: Returns record IDs from the current found set as a list or JSON array. FM 2025+

GetTableDDL.description: Returns table info in DDL format for a JSON array of table occurrences. FM 2025+

GetTextFromPDF.description: Returns the text found in a PDF in the specified container field. FM 2025+

GetTokenCount.description: Returns the token count for the specified text. FM 2024+

Go to List of Records [ss].description: Go to List of Records. FM 2025+

If Else If [block].body:
If [ ${1:condition1} ]
	$2
Else If [ ${3:condition2} ]
	$4
Else
	$0
End If

If Get LastError [block].body:
If [ Get ( LastError ) ≠ 0 ]
	# Handle error
	Set Variable [ \$error; Value: Get ( LastError ) ]
	$0
End If

Insert Embedding in Found Set [ss].description: Insert Embedding in Found Set. FM 2024+

Insert Image Caption [ss].description: Sends an image to a captioning model and inserts the returned caption. FM 2026+

Insert Image Captions in Found Set [ss].description: For every record in the found set, sends an image to a captioning model and inserts the caption. FM 2026+

JSONGetElement [nested].description: JSONGetElement con ruta dot-notation para claves anidadas.

JSONMakeArray.description: Converts a separated list into a JSON array. FM 2024+

JSONParse.description: Parses text as JSON and keeps it in memory for reuse. FM 2025+

JSONParsedState.description: Returns 0 (not parsed), -1 (parsed invalid), or JSON type (parsed valid). FM 2025+

LayoutObjectUUID.description: Returns the Universally Unique Identifier (UUID) of the layout object in which the calculation is defined.

ListPersistentDataIDs.description: Returns a list of instance IDs for entries with the specified name in the persistent data store. FM 2026+

Loop [block].body:
Loop
	$0
	Exit Loop If [ ${1:condition} ]
End Loop
Loop [block].description: Loop block with Exit Loop If

NPV.description: Returns the net present value (NPV) of a series of unequal payments made at regular intervals, assuming a fixed interest rate per interval.

Omit Multiple Records [ss].body: Omit Multiple Records [ With dialog: Off; Current Record; ${1:1} ]$0

Open PDF [ss].description: Opens an existing PDF file. FM 2026+

PDF workflow [block].body:
Create PDF
Save Records as PDF [ Append to open PDF ]
Append to PDF [ ${1:anotherSource} ]
Close PDF [ "${2:outputPath}" ]$0
PDF workflow [block].description: Full PDF creation workflow: create, append, save. FM 2026+

Perform Find [ss].body:
Set Error Capture [ On ]
Perform Find [ Restore ]
If [ Get ( LastError ) = 401 ]
	# No records found
	$0
End If

Perform Find by Natural Language [ss].description: Perform Find by Natural Language. FM 2024+

Perform Find/Replace [ss].body: Perform Find/Replace [ With dialog: Off; Find: "${1:find}"; Replace: "${2:replace}" ]$0

Perform SQL Query by Natural Language [s.description: Perform SQL Query by Natural Language. FM 2024+

Persistent data read [block].description: Read a value from the persistent data store. FM 2026+

Persistent data write [block].description: Write a value to the persistent data store. FM 2026+

PredictFromModel.description: Returns predicted value from a trained regression model. FM 2024+

Print PDF [ss].description: Prints a PDF from the specified file path, container field, or variable. FM 2026+

Refresh Window [ss].body: Refresh Window [ Flush cached join results ]$0

Relookup Field Contents [ss].body: Relookup Field Contents [ With dialog: Off; ${1:Table::Field} ]$0

Save a Copy as [ss].body: Save a Copy as [ File Name: "${1:backup.fmp12}"; Type: compacted copy ]$0

Set Selection [ss].body: Set Selection [ ${1:Table::Field}; Start Position: ${2:1}; End Position: ${3:10} ]$0

Set Window Title [ss].body: Set Window Title [ Current Window; New Title: "${1:title}" ]$0

Sort Records [ss].body: Sort Records [ Restore; With dialog: Off ]$0

SortValues.body: SortValues ( ${1:values} ${2:; ${3:DATATYPE: 1 Text | 2 Number | 3 Date | 4 Time | 5 Timestamp | -1 Text (DESC) | -2 Number (DESC) | -3 Date (DESC) | -4 Time (DESC) | -5 Timestamp (DESC)} ${4:; ${5:LOCALE: en-US, fr-FR, it-IT, de-DE, es-ES, pt-BR, zh-Hans}}} )$0

SubtractEmbeddings.description: Subtracts embedding v2 from v1 and returns normalized result. FM 2024+

TextFont.body: TextFont ( ${1:text} ; ${2:"${3:fontName}"}${4: ; ${5:Roman | Greek | Cryllic | CentralEurope | ShiftJIS | TraditionalChinese | SimplifiedChinese | OEM | Symbol | Other}} )$0

TextFontRemove.body: TextFontRemove ( ${1:text}${2: ; "${3:fontName}" ; ${4:Roman | Greek | Cryllic | CentralEurope | ShiftJIS | TraditionalChinese | SimplifiedChinese | OEM | Symbol | Other}} )$0

TextStyleAdd.body: TextStyleAdd ( ${1:text} ; ${2:Plain | Bold | Italic | Underline | Condense | Extend | Strikethrough | SmallCaps | Superscript | Subscript | Uppercase | Lowercase | Titlecase | WordUnderline | DoubleUnderline | AllStyles} )$0

TextStyleRemove.body: TextStyleRemove ( ${1:text} ; ${2:Plain | Bold | Italic | Underline | Condense | Extend | Strikethrough | SmallCaps | Superscript | Subscript | Uppercase | Lowercase | Titlecase | WordUnderline | DoubleUnderline | AllStyles} )$0

Truncate Table [ss].body: Truncate Table [ With dialog: Off; Table: "${1:TableName}" ]$0

UniqueValues.body: UniqueValues ( ${1:values} ${2:; ${3:DATATYPE: 1 Text | 2 Number | 3 Date | 4 Time | 5 Timestamp} ${4:; ${5:LOCALE: en-US, fr-FR, it-IT, de-DE, es-ES, pt-BR, zh-Hans}}} )$0
